name: art.provenio/mcp
title: Provenio — Art Intelligence
description: Art-provenance intelligence: 282K-node knowledge graph, 100K+ auction lots, custody chains with Nazi-era (HEAR Act) / colonial / Knoedler risk flagging, influence networks, verbatim critical reception. ChatGPT-compatible (search/fetch). Surfaces provenance gap status; never asserts clean title.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Optional — open beta needs no key. Anonymous use: 5,000 calls/month, IP-based, all 27 tools, full corpus. Need a higher cap? Write to ceo@provenio.art. Institutional (private instance, custom ingest, data residency US/EU/CH): contact via https://provenio.art.

io.modelcontextprotocol.registry/publish.data_integrity: HEAR Act 2025 compliant; all facts source-cited. Reproducible audit trail (re-run tools/e2e/*.py against live API/DB): see _reports/apex/EVIDENCE_LEDGER_2026-05-31.md and https://provenio.art/api/stats
